title: Villager Trades | All Her Subjects
description: This project adds fourteen new villager professions to the game! For the village dwellers like me.
body:
![All Her Subjects - Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47b39f51f4f53c6f2051c8a3edd2610b60bd84de.png)

This project adds several new villager professions to the game! The first in a series of Mods to come, set in a not-yet-released universe, All Her Creatures.

### The professions are:

- Landscaper
- Artist
- Innkeeper
- Lumberjack
- Fool
- Shipwright
- Carpenter
- Miner
- Gardener
- Alchemist
- Trackmaster
- Bog Merchant
- Ashstrider
- Stonebinder

## Check out the Mod Gallery for Crafting Recipes!

## For a list of all possible trades, look below!


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

## Landscaper

**Novice**

1 Emerald -> 16 Sand

1 Emerald -> 16 Dirt

16 Sand -> 1 Emerald

16 Dirt -> 1 Emerald

**Apprentice**

1 Emerald -> 16 Red Sand

1 Emerald -> 4 Moss Blocks

8 Gravel -> 1 Emerald

Journeyman

1 Emerald -> 2 Flowering Azaleas

12 Moss Carpets -> 1 Emerald

1 Emerald -> 3 Big Dripstone Leaves

**Expert**

1 Emerald -> 6 Mud

16 Mangrove Roots -> 1 Emerald

1 Emerald -> 8 Coarse Dirt

**Master**

1 Emerald -> 4 Podzol

1 Emerald -> Mycelium

24 Emeralds -> 1 Skeleton Head
